raw_consumer_statement: XXXX I purchased a coat, coat didnt fit I returned it. Old navy confirmed they received jacket I waited over 30 days for refund. I get refund and old navy still knowingly goes into account in XXXX and takes {$250.00} after my balance was {$30.00}. We resolve the issue after flagging a problem with FTC. They refused to call me back until I had to threaten authorities to report them then I got a call back. THEN AGAIN AFTER THEY SEND CHECK AND EVERYTHING GOES AWAY THEY RECHARGE ME ANOTHER {$210.00} for nothing and it shows in my statement I never purchased anything for {$210.00}.
